ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hardware_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hardware status entry */,
  "component" TEXT /* Name of the hardware component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component */,
  "error_log_address" TEXT /* Address where the error log starts */,
  "error_log_length" INTEGER /* Length of the error log */,
  "error_log_gpu_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the GPU related to error logging */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the hardware component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the component */,
  "component_model" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_status_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware status entry */,
  "error_data" TEXT /* Data related to the error */,
  "error_source" TEXT /* Source of the error */,
  "log_entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the error log was recorded */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Current status of the error resolution */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the resolution of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES hardware_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware status entry */,
  "sensor_blocks" TEXT /* Data blocks containing sensor information */,
  "sensor_data_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor data format */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the component */,
  "sensor_reading" REAL /* Current reading of the sensor */,
  "reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES hardware_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the component manufacturer */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the component's warranty expires */,
  "technical_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed technical specifications of the component */,
  "parent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware status entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES hardware_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
